name: vibe-iterate
description: Post-ship product iteration for Google Antigravity — pick a mode (feature-add, competitive, ux-polish, bug-bash) or reach for a sidecar (radar, spy, scan-releases, rate, ship, upgrade). One PR per session, regression-aware, small-diff-preferred. First-run bootstrap identifies the app type and interviews you for competitors + framework pins. Composes with vibe-cartographer when present. Self-evolves via session + friction logging. No telemetry.
author: 626Labs LLC

port.notes: Manifest mirrors the Claude Code plugin.json version. Read by vibe-iterate-session-logger/vibe-iterate-friction-logger for the plugin_version audit field. Antigravity discovers workflows from .agent/workflows/ and skills from .agent/skills/ — this file is a port-bookkeeping manifest, not a discovery requirement.
